title: DisablePhantom
body:
**DisablePhantom** is a simple and efficient plugin that allows players and server administrators to control the spawning and effects of phantoms in Minecraft. Using the straightforward command /phantom, players can toggle phantom behavior on or off, giving them full control over whether or not these hostile mobs interfere with their gameplay.

### **Command Usage:**

- _/phantom_ – This command allows players to toggle phantom spawning and effects. When activated, phantoms will no longer spawn or affect the player. Re-running the command will re-enable phantom behavior.
  
- This command is executed per player, meaning individual players can choose to disable phantoms without affecting others on the server.

### **Target Audience:**

- Server Administrators looking to fine-tune the player experience by eliminating the frustration of phantom encounters.
  
- Players who wish to play without the disturbance of phantoms, especially in single-player modes or peaceful environments where phantoms may not be desired.

### **Benefits:**

- Easy to Use: With just a single command, players can seamlessly toggle phantom behavior with no complicated configuration required.
  
- Improved Player Experience: Prevents unwanted phantom interactions, ensuring smoother gameplay and reducing potential player frustration, especially during late-night or prolonged in-game activities.
  
- Customizable: Each player has control over their phantom settings, enabling tailored gameplay without disrupting others on the server.
